zh.Weston Longville, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可韋斯頓 隆維爾
zh.Shaftesbury, Dorsetshire, England: 英國英格蘭多瑟特沙福斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Luttrell於1388年4月出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，她的父親Sir Hugh Luttrell24歲，母親Katherine Beaumont33歲。她於1406年4月24日與William Harleston結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1439年4月在英國諾福爾可韋斯頓 隆維爾享年51歲。

zh-hans.Shaftesbury, Dorsetshire, England: 英国英格兰多瑟特沙福斯波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Luttrell于1388年4月出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Luttrell24岁，母亲Katherine Beaumont33岁。她于1406年4月24日与William Harleston结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1439年4月在英国諾福爾可韋斯頓 隆維爾享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Luttrell was born in April 1388, in Dunster, Somerset, England, her father, Sir Hugh Luttrell, was 24 and her mother, Katherine Beaumont, was 33. She married William Harleston on 24 April 1406. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in April 1439, in Weston Longville, Norfolk, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Luttrell est née en avril 1388, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Luttrell, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Katherine Beaumont, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William Harleston le 24 avril 1406. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en avril 1439, à Weston Longville, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Luttrell im April 1388 in Dunster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Luttrell 24 und ihre Mutter Katherine Beaumont 33. Sie hat am 24. April 1406 William Harleston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb im April 1439 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Weston Longville, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Luttrell è nata il nel aprile 1388 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Luttrell, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Katherine Beaumont, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato William Harleston il 24 aprile 1406. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel aprile 1439, nel Weston Longville, Norfolk, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Luttrellが1388年4月にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Luttrellは24歳，母Katherine Beaumontは33歳であった。1406年4月24日にWilliam Harlestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1439年4月にイギリスノーフォルクウエストン ロングヴィルで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Luttrell(이)가 1388년 4월 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Luttrell(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Beaumont(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1406년 4월 24일 William Harleston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 4월 영국 노르폴크 웨스턴 론그빌에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Luttrell nasceu em abril de 1388, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Luttrell, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Beaumont, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com William Harleston em 24 de abril de 1406. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em abril de 1439, em Weston Longville, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Luttrell родилась апрель 1388 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Luttrell было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Beaumont, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Harleston 24 апреля 1406 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла апрель 1439 г. в местности вестон лонгвилл, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Luttrell nació en abril de 1388, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Luttrell, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Katherine Beaumont, tenía 33 años. Se casó con William Harleston el 24 de abril de 1406. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en abril de 1439, en Weston Longville, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
